name: ts-skynet-hybrid
description: TS-Skynet Hybrid Development Framework - TypeScript to Skynet Lua Runtime

scripts.build:ts: cd server && npx tsx scripts/cli/index.ts build:ts
scripts.docker:build: cd docker && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/deploy.ps1 build
scripts.docker:start: cd docker && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/deploy.ps1 start
scripts.docker:stop: cd docker && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/deploy.ps1 stop
scripts.docker:status: cd docker && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/deploy.ps1 status
scripts.docker:logs: cd docker && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/deploy.ps1 logs
scripts.docker:copy: cd server && npx tsx scripts/cli/index.ts build:ts
